overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night. The player walks along MLK Blvd past industrial structures with red warning lights and a building with green neon signage, crossing at Valley and continuing toward Santa Cruz. The atmosphere is foggy and dystopian with wet streets reflecting the artificial lights, characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: passing MLK Blvd street sign, entering the main street view with industrial structures ahead
green neon wall becomes visible on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, observing the industrial structures and red-lit bridge ahead

building facade covered in continuous green neon tube lights and digital signage
tall industrial structures with smokestacks, pipes, and smoke plumes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the MLK Blvd sign in a rainy, foggy cyberpunk city. The camera walks forward along a wet concrete sidewalk, revealing massive industrial structures with red warning lights ahead and a building with bright green neon signage on the right. Sparse pedestrians and occasional vehicles move through the hazy night atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway adjacent to neon-lit commercial building under industrial bridge

events.description: passing underneath the industrial red bridge structure with massive support columns
approaching Valley intersection, traffic light visible ahead showing red signal

agents.ego_description: walking under the industrial bridge, passing other pedestrians on the crowded sidewalk next to the green neon wall

notable_agents.action: person carrying a glowing orange umbrella walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green street sign reading Valley hanging over the intersection
traffic signal showing red light for vehicles

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive industrial red bridge, the green neon wall dominates the right side of the frame. The camera approaches the Valley intersection where a traffic light hangs overhead. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, including one with a distinctive glowing orange umbrella. The industrial buildings remain visible on the left through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalks and overhead arch structures

events.description: crossing the wet street at the Valley intersection alongside other pedestrians
continuing straight along the sidewalk past the intersection, approaching Santa Cruz

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at the intersection, navigating around other pedestrians in the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: green street sign reading Santa Cruz visible in the distance
large curved architectural structures spanning across the street overhead

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wet asphalt street at the Valley intersection, moving through a moderate crowd of pedestrians. Large overhead arch structures become visible in the distance, and the Santa Cruz sign appears ahead. The industrial red bridge recedes into the background on the left while the green neon wall continues along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital billboards and neon signage approaching Santa Cruz

events.description: approaching Santa Cruz intersection with clear view of the street signage
passing by a large illuminated digital billboard on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the final stretch toward Santa Cruz, passing various pedestrians including one with distinctive cybernetic implants

notable_agents.action: person with bright red hair and glowing red cybernetic eye implants walking past the camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics on building facade
traffic signal showing red light at the Santa Cruz intersection

segments.scene_description: Approaching the Santa Cruz intersection, the camera walks past a large digital billboard on the left. The green neon wall remains prominent on the right. A pedestrian with distinctive red hair and glowing cybernetic eyes passes by. The Santa Cruz street sign becomes clearly visible overhead as the walk continues through the rainy, neon-lit streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk district that transitions from a heavy industrial zone toward a bustling urban intersection. It begins by moving past an MLK Blvd sign along a wet concrete sidewalk, where massive industrial structures with red warning lights loom ahead and a bright green neon wall glows to the right. As the camera passes beneath a towering red bridge, the scene shifts toward the Valley intersection, weaving through pedestrians including one carrying a glowing orange umbrella. The movement then carries across the wet asphalt of the crossing, leaving the industrial bridge behind as large overhead arches and the Santa Cruz sign emerge through the haze. Finally, the camera glides past a large digital billboard and a pedestrian with glowing cybernetic eyes, coming to a stop beneath the Santa Cruz street sign amidst the persistent rain and neon glare.
